docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JORDAN, ERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE $2,237.41 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,287.41, DEFENDANT SOPHIE LAU DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ERICA JORDAN. JEFFREY LAU-CASE DISMISSED. RUTH LAU-CASE DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JORDAN, ERICA
DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JORDAN, ERICA
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LAU, SOPHIE MAILED TO RESPONDENT JORDAN, ERICA
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-08-2020 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,350.00 FILED BY JORDAN, ERICA AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE LAU, JEFFREY DBA  LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP LAU, RUTH DBA  LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00- SERVED SEP-20-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ERICA JORDAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOPHIE LAU DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LAURA COSTELLO, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT JEFFREY LAU DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUTH LAU DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES THE DEFENDANTS RUTH LAU AND JEFFREY LAU. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JAN-08-2020 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2020 BY JASON JUNGREIS. JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT RECORDED. (525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT JORDAN, ERICA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LAU, SOPHIE $2,196.25 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,271.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO APPELLANT LAU, SOPHIE

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Sophie Lau the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Erica Jordan the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Sophie Lau testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
#1: Letter from the Rental Agent regarding parking.
#2: Group of photographs showing garbage.

Respondent, Plaintiff Erica Jordan testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
A: Move out photographs.
D1: Replacement exhibit of initially submitted.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-25-2019 Judgment Entered
